name: linTransmitHeader
title: linTransmitHeader
description: Transmits a frame header for a specific LIN frame.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: ID of the LIN frame whose header will be transmitted.

return: Returns 1 if the transmission succeeded, otherwise 0.
